CustomField.description: For the Primary Applicant, at the time of application. Optional. Tip: Edit this help text with a description of your program's definition. To track all household members, add a new custom field to the Application Household Member layout.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
For the Primary Applicant, at the time of application. Optional.
Tip: Edit this help text with a description of your program's definition. To track all household members, add a new custom field to the Application Household Member layout.
CustomField.label: Veteran
